S.FORM: = Michel Aoun = Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 9 jiyax 30 ka Michel Aoun ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Lebanon ta sayang o kiya ka Michel Aoun, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = miʦħəl aoun = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka miʦħəl aoun ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ləbanon ta sajaŋ o kija ka miʦħəl aoun, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Michel Aoun = Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 9 jiyax 30 ka Michel Aoun ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Lebanon ta sayang o kiya ka Michel Aoun, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = miʦħəl aoun = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka miʦħəl aoun ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ləbanon ta sajaŋ o kija ka miʦħəl aoun, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
